/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wno-error=array-bounds -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -Wextra-semi -fno-rtti -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -march=native -mtune=generic -Wno-deprecated -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/prs_generator_validator_test.dir/prs/prs_generator_validator_test.cpp.o -o prs_generator_validator_test  ../../../../../lib/phy/upper/signal_processors/libocudu_prs_generator.a ../../../../../lib/ran/libocudu_ran.a ../../../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../../../lib/phy/upper/sequence_generators/libocudu_sequence_generators.a ../../../../../lib/phy/generic_functions/precoding/libocudu_channel_precoder.a ../../../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a ../../../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../../../lib/support/math/libocudu_support_math.a ../../../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
